serpPattern.notes: SERP is mixed, but B2B manufacturer/supplier intent is the strongest single cluster. Do not force this Draft into Product only because a matching product page exists.

rationale: Manual workflow decision: Draft metadata target_url explicitly points to the manufacturer URL requested for this test.
SERP evidence is mixed but Manufacturer is the strongest single pattern for B2B supplier intent.
Existing product page should remain protected; this test creates a differentiated manufacturer landing page instead of rewriting product content.
The page supports importer, distributor, OEM, factory, and supplier search intent.
keywordConflictRisk: Medium: related to existing hex dumbbell product page, but target intent is manufacturer/supplier sourcing rather than product specification.
duplicatePageRisk: Low: no existing /manufacturer/rubber-hex-dumbbell-manufacturer page found in the current website structure.
seoImpact: Create a manufacturer-intent landing page while preserving product page intent and linking back to factory, product, and contact pages.
